title: jasminum greenii
intro: Jasminum greenii, also known as Star Jasmine or Chinese Night Blooming Jasmine, is an evergreen climbing shrub native to China and Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins. The health benefits of Jasminum greenii include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for insomnia, hypertension, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Jasminum greenii are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be applied topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
